'''âf-m-p''' ('''kafamap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:illiberalize|illiberalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:illiberalize|illiberalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| kafamap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamap|thifamap]] || [[word:jifamap|jifamap]] || [[word:shifamap|shifamap]] || [[word:kifamap|kifamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufamap|thuthufamap]] || [[word:jujufamap|jujufamap]] || [[word:shushufamap|shushufamap]] || [[word:kukufamap|kukufamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufamap|thufamap]] || [[word:jufamap|jufamap]] || [[word:shufamap|shufamap]] || [[word:kufamap|kufamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufamap|thufamap]] || [[word:jufamap|jufamap]] || [[word:shufamap|shufamap]] || [[word:kufamap|kufamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefamap|thefamap]] || [[word:jefamap|jefamap]] || [[word:shefamap|shefamap]] || [[word:kefamap|kefamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofamap|thothofamap]] || [[word:jojofamap|jojofamap]] || [[word:shoshofamap|shoshofamap]] || [[word:kokofamap|kokofamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamap|thofamap]] || [[word:jofamap|jofamap]] || [[word:shofamap|shofamap]] || [[word:kofamap|kofamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamap|thofamap]] || [[word:jofamap|jofamap]] || [[word:shofamap|shofamap]] || [[word:kofamap|kofamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfamap|thĂŠfamap]] || [[word:jĂŠfamap|jĂŠfamap]] || [[word:shĂŠfamap|shĂŠfamap]] || [[word:kĂŠfamap|kĂŠfamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafamap|thathafamap]] || [[word:jajafamap|jajafamap]] || [[word:shashafamap|shashafamap]] || [[word:kakafamap|kakafamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamap|thafamap]] || [[word:jafamap|jafamap]] || [[word:shafamap|shafamap]] || [[word:kafamap|kafamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafamap|thafamap]] || [[word:jafamap|jafamap]] || [[word:shafamap|shafamap]] || [[word:kafamap|kafamap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafamap|shafamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafamap|goshafamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafamap|gokishafamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafamapnĂŒ|shafamapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafamapnknĂŒ|goshafamapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamapnĂŒ|gokishafamapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafamapshĂ«|shafamapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafamapnkshĂ«|goshafamapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafamapshĂ«|gokishafamapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamapro|shafamapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamapnkro|goshafamapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamapro|gokishafamapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamapmu|shafamapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamapnkmu|goshafamapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamapmu|gokishafamapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafamapsher|shafamapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafamapnksher|goshafamapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafamapsher|gokishafamapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafamapng|shafamapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafamapnkng|goshafamapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafamapng|gokishafamapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafamapya|shafamapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafamapnkya|goshafamapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafamapya|gokishafamapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafamapyam|shafamapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafamapnkyam|goshafamapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafamapyam|gokishafamapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamapnĂŒshĂ«|shafamapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafamapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafamapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamapnĂŒro|shafamapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamapnknĂŒro|goshafamapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamapnĂŒro|gokishafamapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamapnĂŒmu|shafamapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamapnknĂŒmu|goshafamapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamapnĂŒmu|gokishafamapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamapshĂ«nĂŒ|shafamapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafamapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafamapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamapshĂ«ro|shafamapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamapnkshĂ«ro|goshafamapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamapshĂ«ro|gokishafamapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamapshĂ«mu|shafamapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamapnkshĂ«mu|goshafamapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamapshĂ«mu|gokishafamapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamapronĂŒ|shafamapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamapnkronĂŒ|goshafamapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamapronĂŒ|gokishafamapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamaproshĂ«|shafamaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamapnkroshĂ«|goshafamapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamaproshĂ«|gokishafamaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamapromu|shafamapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamapnkromu|goshafamapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamapromu|gokishafamapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamapmunĂŒ|shafamapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamapnkmunĂŒ|goshafamapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamapmunĂŒ|gokishafamapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamapmushĂ«|shafamapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamapnkmushĂ«|goshafamapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamapmushĂ«|gokishafamapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamapmuro|shafamapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamapnkmuro|goshafamapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamapmuro|gokishafamapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
